support.full_anchor_definition: positive-weight demographic roster at exact collection wave b+1
positive-weight demographic roster at exact collection wave b+1
positive-weight demographic roster at exact collection wave b+1

implementation.fixed_weight: exact b+1 full-anchor weight held across the window
implementation.full_boundary_anchor: all positive-weight demographic persons at exact wave b+1; split and ordinal assignment precede earnings-domain intersection
implementation.refresh_wrapper: advance incumbent parent bridge once, replay exact seed into unchanged incumbent generate, then isolated codes 4 and 5
implementation.sex_frame: fixed nonmissing schema-only sentinel; sex is absent from every numerical earnings input
implementation.stable_pool: positive-to-positive pair donors partitioned by exact target five-year age bin; incumbent order, ranks, weights, kNN helper

protocol.one_se_rule: sqrt((19/20) * sum((J_-r - mean(J_-r))^2)); smallest retained q at or below J(q_min)+SE

reducer.removed: 21 x 3 x 20 repetitive projected-draw records and the 3 x 20 q=0 per-draw equivalence records
reducer.retained: all registered fit/pool/support/RNG checksums, truth moments, standardizers, aggregate projected moments and scores, full/half/delete-one objectives, guards, one-SE cutoff, and selection

provenance.estimation_rule: forward earnings income-reference period <=T*; age 25-64; calendar-invariant NAWI-normalized marginal

selector.q0_dispatch_disposition: q=0 is a valid selector outcome; lock-addendum posture remains DRAFT_NOT_OPERATIVE pending referee/orchestrator ratification

weak_improvement_counterfactual.weakened_comparison: all_20 only; fixed halves remain strict

source_audit.dating_note: family labor-income levels are field-dated by their verified income-reference year. For the amendment-required 2014 earnings row, the incumbent family-panel convention reads the 2015 collection-wave age, sequence, relationship, weight, and interview fields: relationship/interview attach the two family labor fields, sequence defines presence, and age/weight enter support and reduction. This is the sole collection wave above 2014; no 2015 earnings-reference field is requested
source_audit.nawi_read_policy: no NAWI value is loaded during source assembly; each q-by-boundary cell performs an unbuffered prefix read that stops at that exact b and asserts its frozen prefix and mapping hashes

psid_field_read.individual_reader: panels.ind_person_period with an explicit collection-wave list
